fields.name: Worksheet Template Name
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally. Links the untracked planning element to a requisition line and can be accessed from either the requisition or planning worksheet.
For more information on untracked planning surplus, see Untracked Planning Element.

fields.name: Worksheet Batch Name
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally. Links the untracked planning element to a requisition line and can be accessed from either the requisition or planning worksheet.
For more information on untracked planning surplus, see Untracked Planning Element.

fields.name: Worksheet Line No.
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally. Links the untracked planning element to a requisition line and can be accessed from either the requisition or planning worksheet.
For more information on untracked planning surplus, see Untracked Planning Element.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item in the requisition line for which untracked planning surplus exists.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code in the requisition line associated with the untracked planning surplus.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source of the untracked planning quantity. This field is used internally by the program.
For more information on untracked planning surplus, see Untracked Planning Element.

fields.name: Source ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identification code for the source of the untracked planning quantity.

fields.name: Parameter Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of this planning parameter.

fields.name: Untracked Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how much this planning parameter contributed to the total surplus quantity.

fields.name: Track Quantity From
fields.tooltip: Specifies how much the total surplus quantity is, including the quantity from this entry.

fields.name: Track Quantity To
fields.tooltip: Specifies what the surplus quantity would be without the quantity from this entry.

fields.name: Source
fields.tooltip: Specifies what the source of this untracked surplus quantity is.

fields.name: Warning Level
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.
